scientific_question: Can A333 temporal smoothing and the A329-A332 stability-margin mechanisms be recapitulated one width earlier, selected by a clean W43-W44 to W45 walk-forward test, and deployed unchanged as a W46 order?

pair_operator_contract.inputs: previous and current exact Fine-Coarse-Numeric fields with unchanged A317 prototypes
pair_operator_contract.temporal_order: exact rank midpoint of previous and current raw Linf orders, selected by A333
pair_operator_contract.stability_order: A329 stable-to-switched 2:1 merge of the current raw order using same-prototype membership across the input pair
pair_operator_contract.margin_score: negative absolute difference of previous and current exact nearest-prototype margins
pair_operator_contract.margin_consistency_order: descending margin score then stability-order rank then cell
pair_operator_contract.margin_inconsistency_control_order: ascending margin score then stability-order rank then cell
pair_operator_contract.consistency_borda_order: A332 rank-sum Borda of the stability and margin-consistency orders
pair_operator_contract.outer_borda_order: rank-sum Borda of the temporal order and the named structural order

forecast_contract.walk_forward_training_pair: W43 previous plus W44 current, constructed without W45 fields, then compared with complete target-blind W45 raw Linf order
forecast_contract.walk_forward_selection: maximum Spearman, then minimum mean absolute rank error, then frozen eligible index
forecast_contract.deployment_pair: W44 previous plus W45 current, applying the selected unchanged candidate construction to freeze W46

predeclared_outputs: exact pair-local W43-W44 and W44-W45 prototype assignments, margins and structural source hashes
identity gates reproducing A329, A332 and A333 deployment-order hashes
eight exact walk-forward W45 forecast orders with complete-field metrics
one selected construction under the frozen eligible-only rule
eight exact W46 forecast orders and one selected W46 order hash
postconfirmation A325 rank panel without duplicate candidate execution
